The rufous-winged philentoma (Philentoma pyrhoptera) is a bird species. They are now usually assigned to the Vangidae.
It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, Thailand, and Vietnam.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.


Diet
It is an insectivore.

The '''rufous-winged philentoma''' ('''''Philentoma pyrhoptera''''') is a [[bird]] [[species]]. They are now usually assigned to the [[Vangidae]].
It is found in [[Brunei]], [[Indonesia]], [[Malaysia]], [[Myanmar]], [[Thailand]], and [[Vietnam]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.

== Diet ==
It is an [[insectivore]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last=Othman |first=Nursyuhada |last2=Muniar |first2=Kaviarasu |last3=Haris |first3=Hidayah |last4=Ramli |first4=Farah Farhana |last5=Sariyat |first5=Nur Hartini |last6=Najmuddin |first6=Mohd Faudzir |last7=Abdul-Latiff |first7=Muhammad Abu Bakar |date=2023-01-31 |title=A Review of Next-Generation Wildlife Monitoring using Environmental DNA (eDNA) Detection and Next-Generation Sequencing in Malaysia |journal=Sains Malaysiana |volume=52 |issue=1 |pages=17–33 |doi=10.17576/jsm-2023-5201-02 |issn=0126-6039|doi-access=free }}</ref>
